name: -o
--output-dir
options.description: Directory where to store built files

options.name: --loglevel
options.description: Controls level of logging during build

name: -s
--static-dir
options.description: Directory where to load static files from, comma-separated list

name: -c
--config-dir
options.description: Directory where to load Storybook configurations from

options.name: --https
options.description: Serve Storybook over HTTPS. Note: You must provide your own certificate information

options.name: --ssl-ca
options.description: Provide an SSL certificate authority. (Optional with --https, required if using a self-signed certificate)

options.name: --ci
options.description: CI mode (skip interactive prompts, don't open browser)

options.name: --debug-webpack
options.description: Display final webpack configurations for debugging purposes

options.name: --webpack-stats-json
options.description: Write Webpack Stats JSON to disk

options.name: --no-manager-cache
options.description: Disables Storybook's manager caching mechanism. NOTE: this flag disables the internal caching of Storybook and can severely impact your Storybook loading time, so only use it when you need to refresh Storybook's UI, such as when editing themes
